subcodes.first_line: O true friend! For some time now hath the call of war been raised, and East and West have become the battlefield of fierce and formidable hosts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی چندی است که آهنگ جنگ بلند است و شرق و غرب میدان سپاه تیزچنگ
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @war and peace, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
